data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of switching modality (in-person to remote if sick). However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that the system supports this functionality, as it only describes a scenario where a student switches to virtual due to illness without detailing the mechanism or process for doing so. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not provide a clear, reproducible method for switching modalities when a participant is sick.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality to switch from in-person to remote attendance when a participant is sick.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
